title: Sticky Keys
description: Opponent must play with Toggle Sprint

title: Transparency
description: Opponent must unbind the Cover key

title: Broken Watch
description: Opponent must play without Mission Timer HUD

title: Deafened
description: Opponent must set Master Volume to 0

title: Gibberish
description: Opponent must change Text Language to the Player's choice

title: Beginner Assassin
description: Opponent must play without NPC Icons ("Enforcer Dots")

title: Stiff Knees
description: Opponent must unbind the Crouch key

title: Drunk On The Job
description: Opponent must play with Invert (Mouse) Y

title: Unsuspecting
description: Opponent must play without Attention Indicator ("Woosh bar")

title: Unaware
description: Opponent must play without Mini Map

title: Anti-Cheat
description: Opponent must play without Instinct

title: Tortoise And Hare
description: Opponent must unbind the Run key

title: Hired Gun
description: Opponent must select a non-suit start

title: Tailor-Made
description: Opponent must select a suit start

title: Empty Pocket
description: Opponent must keep a Gear slot empty

title: Iron Stomach
description: Opponent cannot bring emetics

title: No Business
description: Opponent cannot bring a briefcase (Gear or Smuggle)

title: Welcome To
description: Opponent must select default start

title: Border Patrol
description: Opponent must keep the Smuggled Item slot empty

title: Humble Beginnings
description: Opponent must play with default loadout

title: Insomnia
description: Opponent cannot bring sedatives

title: American Horror Story
description: Opponent must keep the Concealed Weapon slot empty

title: Master Assassin
description: Opponent must play on Master difficulty

title: Technically Legal
description: Opponent cannot bring items that are illegal to hold

title: Broke Boy
description: Opponent must play without any loadout

title: RR8 Throwback
description: The next spin features secondary condition restrictions

title: Leaked Intel
description: Player can see the spin 60 seconds earlier (but not play)

title: American Dream
description: The next spin features only loud kills (Firearms or Explosives)

title: Sharp Edges
description: The next spin features only lethal melee kills (incl. Fiber Wire)

title: Whoopsie Daisy
description: The next spin features only accident kills

title: Harbinger
description: Player can curate all kill methods for the next spin (can repeat)

title: Stylist
description: Player can curate all disguises for the next spin (can repeat)

title: Roulette Admin
description: Player can curate the entire spin publicly

title: Jump Start
description: Player gets a 30 second head start

title: Phone-a-Friend
description: Player can have someone helping them in voicechat

title: Instant Replay
description: Player may utilize autosaves

title: A Link To The Past
description: Player may utilize one manual save

title: Wire Tap
description: Player can watch and listen to the shoutcast

title: Paparazzi
description: Player may exit with yellow guns

title: Support Wheels
description: Player must play on Casual difficulty

title: Freestyle Roulette
description: Conditions for the next spin are not assigned to specific targets

title: In A Rush
description: Spin timer is reduced to 10 minutes for both players

title: New Itinerary
description: Shuffle the order of all unplayed maps

title: Old School
description: Opponent cannot have red guns at any time

title: Ultimate Freedom
description: Both players can freely mix and match the condtions among targets

title: Bad GPS
description: Opponent must use the default exit

title: Lego Stuffer
description: Spin can be completed Any% for both players

title: Spin The Wheel
description: Re-roll the unplayed RNG maps

title: Boxed Up
description: Opponent must hide all bodies

title: Double Or Nothing
description: The next map is worth double points

title: More Ammo
description: Draw 2 cards

title: Forced Selflessness
description: Opponent chooses 1 card to give to Player

title: Reload
description: Draw 3 cards, then discard 1 card

title: Take A Peek
description: Opponent reveals their hand to Player

title: Uno Reverse
description: Reverse the effect of the card just played against Player

title: Lots More Ammo
description: Draw 3 cards

title: Two For One Deal
description: The Player's next played card stays in their hand

title: Locked Out
description: Opponent cannot play cards for the next map

title: Theft
description: Opponent gives 1 random card to Player

title: New Identity
description: Discard all cards, then draw 4 cards

title: Hot Potato
description: Once per match, swap this with a card from the Opponent's hand
